rows.name: Cricket
rows.rules_summary: Knockout fixtures run from 2 April to 5 April, with the public site currently showing the published 2 April opening slate.

rows.name: Football
rows.rules_summary: Football follows a knockout format inside the evening tournament window.

rows.name: Volleyball
rows.rules_summary: Volleyball follows a knockout format with one live match at a time.

rows.name: Athletics
rows.rules_summary: Athletics follows elimination runs, with associations advancing round by round until the final.
